title: Playwright's Guns and Buns
description: Guns, Magic and Progression. Need some time to add buns.
body:
![Welcome To Gun's and Bun's!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47aeb6e0f41a3530b3761bd0043860de70cd83bf.png)
Welcome all! To my Gun's and Bun's! This is an **early access** modpack that will hopefully be fully completed by the end of this year, with quests and all! 

## Summary

This pack revolves around progression and guns. You start off with your handy "Whirly" and from that you need build your arsenal of both Gun's, Tools and Armour to conquer the dungeons all around the map.

You are to use the multiple tech mods to create the guns, including everyones favorite mod **Create**. But specifically with the TFMG, Mekanism and AE2. We will hopefully have a full questline available soon.


## Gun's Shoot Fireballs?

Now the main thing about this pack is.... you can have your Gun's shoot out spells! Monster's will occasionally drop an item known as a "Spellencer" which will have a spell attached to it from the Iron's Spells and Spellbook's mod. Depending on the magic school of the spell the bullets from the gun's will also shoot magic damage which corresponds to that school!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/OrOWBHcU1qc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### All Mob's Have Weaknesses and Strengths
Now the guns are cool but what's the point if we don't have anything to shoot them with? Make sure to check out the TES Hud at the top right, it'll tell you how what Resistances/Strengths a certain Mob 

## Bosses Progression (WIP)
Main Idea is to fight multiple different bosses to eventually lead to us going into the End and fighting the Ender Dragon.

For right now though, the first boss is Captain Cornelia! She has been modified though, she hit's like a truck!

We will be creating a questline for this so that's it's a lot more streamlined.
